title: Peter Pan Takes Flight on Stage
story: Fairies, pirates, and a boy who never grows up! J. M. Barrie's magical story 'Peter Pan' first soared onto the stage in 1904. The play's mix of fantasy and fun made it an instant hit, sparking imaginations for generations to come.

story: Asteroids zooming through space might become NASA's next big catch! On December 27, 2012, the space agency revealed an out-of-this-world plan. title: Luka's Legendary Night on the Court
story: Swish! The crowd roared as Luka Dončić sank another basket. On December 27, 2022, the Dallas Mavericks star player had a night for the record books. Dončić became the first NBA player ever to score 60 points, grab 21 rebounds, and dish out 10 assists in a single game. His incredible performance led the Mavericks to a thrilling 126-121 victory over the New York Knicks. It was also the first 60-point game in Mavericks history!

title: Hagia Sophia: A Wonder Unveiled
story: Emperor Justinian I proudly unveiled a masterpiece in 537. The Hagia Sophia, a grand Eastern Orthodox cathedral, opened its doors on December 27. This magnificent building in Constantinople amazed all who saw it. With its massive dome and beautiful mosaics, it became a symbol of Byzantine architecture and faith.
activity_question: What type of building was the Hagia Sophia when it first opened?
bonus_fact: The Hagia Sophia's dome was so large, people thought it was held up by magic!

title: Shaken but Not Broken
story: The ground rumbled and shook violently in 1939. A powerful earthquake struck Erzincan, Turkey on December 27. Many buildings crumbled, but the people's spirit remained strong. Neighbors helped each other, sharing food and shelter. The world sent aid, showing how communities come together in tough times. This event led to improved building codes, making homes safer for future generations.
activity_question: What did the earthquake lead to?
follow_up_question: How can we prepare for earthquakes in our own homes?
